case_title: LE, DUC HUY vs. WONG, NORMAN et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUN-24-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 01
DEPT#1,STUART BRONSTEIN,JUDGE PROTEM; E.ESTACIO, CLERK C/C FOR SETT CONF. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. CASE DID NOT SETTLE.
ASSOCIATION OF ATTORNEYS: BELL, GREGORY PAUL ADDED AS ATTORNEY FOR LE, DUC HUY

DEPT 7/JUDGE TOMAR MASON/REPORTER:LORETTA NAJERA/CLERK:G. SHULL. C/C FOR CONTINUED JURY TRIAL. ATNYS GREGORY BELL AND DENNIS CARR PRESENT WITH PLTF. ATNY MICHAEL SMITH PRESENT WITH DEFT. ROLL CALL OF PROSPECTIVE JURORS AND SWORN AS TO THEIR QUALIFICATIONS. VOIR DIRE BY COURT AND BY COUNSEL. BOTH SIDES EXERCISE PEREMPTORY CHALLENGES. 12 JURORS AND TWO ALTERNATES SWORN TO TRY THE CAUSE. JURY ADMONISHED AND ORDERED TO RETURN AT 9:30AM ON 7-9-97.

DEPT 7/JUDGE MASON/REPORTER:M.NORMAN/CLERK:G.SHULL. C/C FOR CONT'D JURY TRIAL. ALL PARTIES AND JURORS ARE PRESENT. JUROR #1, RACHAEL GOROSTIZA, INFORMS COURT IN CHAMBERS THAT SHE HAS AN UNAVOIDABLE WORK CONFLICT. MS. GOROSTIZA'S REMAINING SERVICE IS DEFERRED WITH THE AGREEMENT OF COUNSEL. THE NAME OF ALT JUROR #1, RENEE GOETZ, IS RANDOMLY SELECTED TO REPLACE MS. GOROSTIZA. COURT PRE-INSTRUCTS JURY. OPENING STATEMENTS BY BOTH SIDES. PLTF'S CASE IN CHIEF COMMENCED. ORAL AND DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED. JURY TRIAL CONTINUED TO 7-10-97 AT 9:00AM FOR COUNSEL AND 9:30AM FOR JURY.

DEFENSE CASE COMMENCED. DEFENSE RESTS. NO REBUTTAL EVIDENCE PRESENTED BY PLTF. CLOSING ARGUMENTS BY BOTH SIDES. COURT INSTRUCTS JURY. BAILIFF C.OLSEN SWORN TO TAKE CHARGE OF JURY DURING DELIBERATIONS. JURY RETURNS WITH VERDICT IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT NORMAN WONG; VERDICT READ INTO RECORD BY CLERK. JURY POLLED AT REQUEST OF PLTF. ALL 12 JURORS ANSWER THAT THIS IS THEIR VERDICT. JURORS THANKED AND EXCUSED. DEFT TO PREPARE JUDGMNT. EXHIBITS AND DEPOSITIONS RETAINED AND LODGED IN CLERK'S OFFICE.
